BMO Announces Upcoming Redemption and Ticker Symbol Change for MicroSectorsTM FANG+™ Index 3× Leveraged ETNs (Ticker: FNGU) as well as the Launch of a New MicroSectorsTM Exchange Traded Note ("ETN"), the MicroSectorsTM FANG+™ 3× Leveraged ETNs (Ticker: FN

holdings.infoBox: FNGU is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 10.64%, Broadcom at 10.23%, NVIDIA at 10.08%, Amazon.com at 10.07%, and Meta Platforms at 9.95%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors FANG+ 3 Leveraged ETNs (FNGU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NYSE FANG+ index. The fund tracks 3x the daily price movements of an index of technology and consumer discretionary companies. The note uses derivatives to achieve its 3x exposure. FNGU was launched on Feb 19, 2025 and is issued by REX Microsectors.

data.text: U.S. natural gas futures were modestly lower as a cooler weather outlook for the second half of June crimped demand expectations.
